title: Post-ticket-079 principal audit checkpoint
problem: Tickets 077–079 complete the scratch evidence workflow doc cross-link chain. Three consecutive done tickets since the post-ticket-076 principal audit require a read-only checkpoint before further Phase 2 implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Read-only audit report in agent_reports/ covering scratch evidence workflow posture, operator loop hooks, and next Phase 2 priorities.
Explicit go/no-go for next implementation ticket after doc cross-link chain.
No runtime or schema changes in the audit ticket itself.
non_goals: Do not implement new features in the audit ticket.
Do not enable live Ollama in golden tests.
